# DRMN - White Noise & Sleep Sounds App

> DRMN is a free white noise app and sound machine for iPhone. Mix rain, fan, and deep sleep sounds, set a fade-out timer up to 10 hours, and listen offline.

## Main Sections

- [Home](https://drmn.xyz/): App overview and features
- [Blog](https://drmn.xyz/blog/): Sleep and focus sound guides (English)
- [Privacy Policy](https://drmn.xyz/privacy.html): Privacy and data handling
- [Terms of Service](https://drmn.xyz/terms.html): Terms and conditions

## Key Facts

- Platform: iOS (iPhone)
- Price: Free with optional premium features
- File Size: 49.2 MB
- Minimum iOS: iOS 17.1 or later
- Category: Health & Fitness
- Developer: Vladimir Ivakhnenko
- App Store Rating: 4.9/5 stars (10 reviews)
- User-reported: App Store reviewers often cite faster sleep onset when masking background noise (individual results vary)

## Features

- White noise, brown noise, dark noise
- Nature sounds (rain, ocean, fire, birds)
- Meditation and focus sounds
- Baby sleep sounds (hair dryer, vacuum, keyboard)
- Sound mixing capabilities
- Offline mode
- Battery-optimized
- Sleep timer with auto-fade

## How-To Guides

- [What Makes a Good White Noise App for iPhone](https://drmn.xyz/guides/white-noise-app/): A white noise app for iPhone needs gapless looping, background playback, a fade-out timer, and offline support. How to check for all four and set up DRMN tonight.
- [Sound Machine App vs Bedside Machine: Which Should You Buy?](https://drmn.xyz/guides/sound-machine-app/): A sound machine app plays the same masking audio as a $50–$100 bedside device, adds mixing and fade timers, and travels with you. When hardware still wins, and how to set up your iPhone as a sleep sound machine.
- [The Best Sounds for Sleep, Ranked by What Wakes You](https://drmn.xyz/guides/best-sounds-for-sleep/): White, pink, and brown noise, rain, fan, and ocean waves compared: which sound to sleep to for traffic, snoring, racing thoughts, or a too-quiet room, and how to test each one.
- [How to Fall Asleep Fast Using Sound](https://drmn.xyz/guides/fall-asleep-fast/): How to fall asleep faster with sound conditioning: the same steady audio cue every night trains your brain to switch off. The 15-minute routine, step by step, with exact settings in DRMN.
- [Rain Sounds for Sleeping: Why They Work and How to Use Them](https://drmn.xyz/guides/rain-sounds-for-sleeping/): Rain sounds sit close to pink noise: broadband masking with a natural texture most brains accept instantly. Why rain beats pure white noise for many sleepers, and the rain + brown noise mix to try first.
- [Sleep Sounds With a Timer: Fade Out Instead of Stopping](https://drmn.xyz/guides/sleep-sounds-with-timer/): A hard audio stop can wake you as surely as a slammed door. Why a gradual fade-out timer matters, all-night audio vs timed playback, and how to set DRMN's 10-hour fade timer.
- [White Noise for Babies: Safe Volume, Distance, and Setup](https://drmn.xyz/guides/white-noise-for-babies/): Pediatric guidance for baby white noise: 50 decibels or below, sound source at least 7 feet from the crib, timer instead of loud all-night play. Which sounds settle newborns and how to set up a phone as a baby sound machine.
- [How to Block Out Snoring With Sound Masking](https://drmn.xyz/guides/block-out-snoring/): Snoring peaks in the low frequencies, so ordinary white noise misses it. Use brown noise or rain layered over brown noise, set just above the snoring volume, with an all-night timer. Setup steps in DRMN.
- [Fan Noise for Sleep — Without Running a Fan All Night](https://drmn.xyz/guides/fan-noise-for-sleep/): Fan sound for sleep without the cold air, dust, or electricity of a real fan. Why fan hum works as a sleep cue, and how to loop gapless fan noise on your iPhone with a fade timer.
- [Deep Sleep Sounds: What to Play for More Restorative Sleep](https://drmn.xyz/guides/deep-sleep-sounds/): Deep sleep happens in your first sleep cycles and is destroyed by micro-awakenings. Low-frequency sounds — brown noise, pink noise, ocean waves — protect it. What to play, at what volume, and for how long.

## Comparison Guides (Blog)

- [DRMN vs Calm](https://drmn.xyz/blog/drmn-vs-calm-sleep-sounds/): Sleep sounds vs meditation apps
- [BetterSleep Alternative](https://drmn.xyz/blog/bettersleep-alternative-iphone/): Free white noise for iPhone
- [Best White Noise Apps Compared](https://drmn.xyz/blog/best-white-noise-apps-iphone-compared/): DRMN, Calm, BetterSleep, White Noise Lite, myNoise
